title: U.S. Carries Out Renewed Strikes in Southern Iran
summary_full: Military officials said that the strikes targeted missile sites near a major Iranian port that threatened U.S. ships and planes.
summary_public: Military officials said that the strikes targeted missile sites near a major Iranian port that threatened U.S. ships and planes.
